summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs were quarantined individually; unrelated non-security PRs were classified conservatively without close, merge, or fix recommendations because this job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and disables low-signal closeout.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive item is out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope; route only this PR and continue unrelated classifications.
Dependency graph/security-gated PR must be routed to central handling rather than closed, merged, or treated as ordinary cleanup.
Process execution and security-boundary shaped changes require central security-aware review, scoped only to this PR.
Related to the workboard dispatch-scope bug, but not a duplicate or close candidate in this inventory shard.
Related to the QMD timeout report, but failing proof and plan-only constraints make non-mutating classification the safe outcome.
Clear relationship to the streaming UI issue, with no closure or merge recommendation available in this inventory shard.
Standalone trajectory feature/config PR should remain independent; failing checks and stale/update signal block merge-style action.
Related to the sessions recovery bug, but unresolved review/check/update blockers make this non-mutating classification only.
Maintainer product/technical judgment is needed before classifying this as a viable fix or closing anything against it.
Related to the Gemini CLI image-capability issue, but open PR status and failing checks block any close/fixed-by-candidate/merge recommendation.

needs_human: #46895 requires maintainer product/technical judgment on whether /model status and /model list should shadow literal model ids, plus follow-up on the reported test syntax/check failures.
